response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:50: Identified intro and news segment. No music. 2. 00:50: Song 'SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL' starts. Used on-screen text to identify composers Toshiya Hosokawa and Funk Uchino, and performer group 'Justice'. 3. Transcribed lyrics directly from the video subtitles as they are accurate for the performance. 4. 04:22-05:00: Identified post-performance talk. No music.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory greeting, a short news segment, a full vocal performance of 'SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL' by the VTuber group 'Justice', and a post-performance discussion.

scenes.description: The video begins with an intro card titled 'JUSTICE SHOPPING'.
A short scene with a woman and a child conversing.
Ouro Kronii presents a short news segment about 'Justice'.
The VTuber group 'Justice' performs their song 'SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL' on stage. Lyrics are shown as subtitles.
